title: cenchrus gracilis
intro: Cenchrus gracilis, also known as slender sandbur or silky threadgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cenchrus gracilis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antiseptic. Cenchrus gracilis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in various traditional remedies and folk medicines.
